app.name: VORTEX
app.welcomeHint: Khetha igumbi noma wenze elisha. Ukuxhumana kusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi — inethiwekhi yendawo kuphela.
app.welcomeSub: Khetha igumbi noma wenze elisha. Ukuxhumana kusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi — inethiwekhi yendawo kuphela.

auth.keyNotFound: Ukhiye oyimfihlo wale akhawunti awutholakali. Ngena ngemvume ngephasiwedi.
auth.subtitle: Umthumeli-myalezo P2P Ongenasikhungo
auth.keyExpiredEnterPassword: Ukhiye uphelelwe yisikhathi. Faka iphasiwedi ye-@{username}:
auth.confirmRemoveAccount: Susa i-akhawunti ohlwini? I-akhawunti ngokwayo ngeke isuswe.
auth.seedPhraseMustBe24Words: Ibinzana lembewu kumele libe namagama angama-24
auth.fillNameAndAllAnswers: Gcwalisa igama kanye nazo zonke izimpendulo ezi-3
auth.seedPhraseWarning: Londoloza lawa magama angama-24! Ziboniswa KANYE kuphela.
auth.seedPhraseHint: Uma ukhohlwa iphasiwedi yakho, lo musho uwukuphela kwendlela yokuthola i-akhawunti yakho. Kubhale phansi ephepheni futhi ukugcine endaweni ephephile.

rooms.emptyHint: Awekho amagumbi — dala noma joyina elilodwa

chat.waitingKeyHistory: Ulinda ukhiye wegumbi ukuze uvule umlando
chat.keyUpdated: Ukhiye wegumbi ubuyekezwe. Ulinda ukhiye omusha...
chat.encryptedTooltip: Umbhalo obethelwe (E2E). Ukususa ukubethela kwenziwa ohlangothini lweklayenti.

saved.noSavedHint: Sebenzisa imenyu yengqikithi yomlayezo ukuze ugcine imilayezo

tasks.noTasks: Ayikho imisebenzi. Engeza umsebenzi wakho wokuqala ngenhla.
tasks.title: Imisebenzi

settings.title: Izilungiselelo
settings.name: Igama
settings.geoFailed: Yehluleka ukuqinisekisa indawo. Hlola ukuthi i-GPS/Wi-Fi ikhona.
settings.geoTimeout: Isikhathi sokuthola indawo sifile. Zama endaweni evulekile.
settings.speaker: Somlomo
settings.ttlPrompt: Ngemuva kwezinsuku ezingaki zokungasebenzi kufanele i-akhawunti isuswe?
settings.sqQuestion1: Kwakuyiliphi igama lesilwane esifuywayo sakho sokuqala?
settings.sqQuestion3: Iyiphi ifilimu yakho yasebuntwaneni owawuyithanda kakhulu?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Uma ukhohlwe iphasiwedi yakho, ungakwazi ukuthola ukufinyelela ngokuphendula imibuzo emi-3. Ungasebenzisa eyakho imibuzo noma ezenzakalelayo.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Ukuhlola kwanyanga zonke - qiniseka ukuthi uyayikhumbula iphasiwedi yakho yokungena.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Sincoma ukuthi ubuyekeze iphasiwedi yakho ngenkathi ungene ngemvume, ukuze ungalahlekelwa ukufinyelela.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Sula inqolobane yemidiya nedatha yesikhashana?

Okhiye bokubethela nezilungiselelo NGEKE kusulwe.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Iseshini kufanele isebenze okungenani izinsuku eziyi-7 ukuze ushintshe iphasiwedi.

Isikhathi esisele: {daysLeft} izinsuku.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Izinsuku eziyisi-7 azikadluli. Sicela ulinde izinsuku ezingu-{daysLeft} ngaphezulu.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Ukufinyelela kwe-geolocation kunqatshiwe.

1. i-macOS: Izilungiselelo Zesistimu → Ubumfihlo → Amasevisi Endawo → vumela isiphequluli
2. Isiphequluli: chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela
3. Layisha kabusha ikhasi
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Ukufinyelela kwe-geolocation kunqatshiwe.

Chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela, bese ulayisha kabusha ikhasi

call.groupCallNotice: Ikholi yeqembu — wonke amalungu egumbi azothola isimemo

bots.installSuccess: I-bot ifakiwe! Yengeze ekamelweni kusukela kuzilungiselelo zekamelwa.
bots.nameTooShort: Igama le-bot kufanele libe nezinhlamvu ezingu-2 okungenani
bots.noMiniAppUrl: Ayikho i-URL ye-Mini App elungiselelwe le-bot.
bots.regenerateTokenConfirm: Khiqiza kabusha ithokheni? Ithokheni endala izoyeka ukusebenza.
bots.noBotsCreateHint: Awunawo ama-bot. Dala i-bot kokuthi Izilungiselelo → Amabhothi

security.twoFAScanHint: Skena i-QR code ku-app yakho yokuqinisekisa (Google Authenticator, Authy, njll.) noma ufake imfihlo ngokwakho:

poll.question: Pergunta
poll.title: Pesquisa
poll.explanationPlaceholder: Por que esta resposta está correta...
poll.enterQuestionAndOptions: Digite uma pergunta e pelo menos 2 opções

stickers.noStickersHelp: Azikho izitikha. Chofoza kwesokudla isithombe → Engeza ezitikha

channel.name: Igama lesiteshi
channel.author: Umbhali
channel.signaturesHint: Bonisa igama lombhali ngaphansi kokuthunyelwe kwabo
channel.hashtagsHint: Ama-hashtag angu-# achofozekayo ukuze azulazule esiteshini

fingerprint.aimCamera: Bhekisa ikhamera ku-QR code yomuntu omunye
fingerprint.emojiHint: Izinhlangothi zombili kufanele zibone i-emoji efanayo. Qhathanisa ngokwesiqu noma ngomgwaqo owuvikelekile.
fingerprint.showQR: Bonisa i-QR code ukuze umuntu omunye ayiskene
fingerprint.title: Ukuqinisekiswa kokhiye
fingerprint.pointCamera: Khomba ikhamera kukhodi ye-QR yomunye umuntu

panic.callSettingsNote: Qaphela: Izindlela ze-Force TCP ne-Relay zinganda ukulibazeka kodwa zinikeze ubumfihlo obukhulu. Ukumbonya ithrafikhi kwengeza imboza engahleliwe emisebenzini ye-SDP.
panic.desc: Yonke idatha kule node izosuswa unaphakade. Lesi senzo asinakuguqulwa.
panic.warningBody:
Usuzoqeda unomphela yonke idatha.
Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Konke ukulandela kususiwe. Lesi sikhathi sesiphelile.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Uma ukhiye omusha wekamelwa utholakala — thumela ngokuzenzakalelayo kuwo wonke amadivayisi akho (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Khopha okhiye bonke ngegama eligciniwe futhi ulondoloze ezikhundleni. Ngoguquko lwedivayisi — buyisela ngegama elilodwa.
privacy.crossSignHint: Qinisekisa amadivayisi amasha ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesiginesha se-HMAC (ukuvikelwa ngenguqulelo)
privacy.federatedHint: Saba izingxenye zebekap ezifihliwe kuma-nodes efederation. Ngisho uma isikhundla silahlekile — buyisela ngezihlobo.
privacy.historySyncHint: Ikhophi yemiyalezo efihliwe itholakala kuwo wonke amadivayisi. Isikhundla sibona umsindo nje
privacy.ktHint: Irekhodi lokwengeza kuphela lawo wonke uguquko lokhiye womphakathi ngomgogodla we-hash (Merkle). Isikhundla siyasayina inguma ngayinye — ubuqili butholakala ngesikhathi sohlolo.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Dlulisela okhiye kudivayisi entsha ngekhodi yamNumber 6. Okhiye bafihliwe nge-ECIES — isikhundla asakwazi ukubafunda.
privacy.ssssHint: Hlukanisa ukhiye oyinhloko izingxenye ezingu-N. Izingxenye ezingu-M ziyobuyisela ukhiye. Ingxenye ngayinye ifihliwe nomxhumani othembekile othile (ECIES). Isikhundla sibona ama-blobs afihliwe kuphela.
privacy.title: Ubumfihlo

contactSync.title: Thola oxhumana nabo
contactSync.desc: Hlola ukuthi yibaphi oxhumana nabo befoni yakho asebevele baku-Vortex. Izinombolo zocingo ziyashesha — iseva ayiziboni.
contactSync.noMatches: Abekho othintana nabo abatholakele ku-Vortex okwamanje
contactSync.stats: Uhlole izinombolo ezingu-{checked}, kwatholakala oxhumana nabo abangu-{found}

errors.noMiniAppUrl: Ayikho i-URL yohlelo lokusebenza oluncane elungiselelwe le bot.

ide.noBotToken: Le phrojekthi ayinayo isethi ye-Bot Token.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Umushwana wokungena kumele okungenani ube nezinhlamvu eziyi-8
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Faka le khodi kudivayisi yakho enkulu
keyBackup.minTwoContacts: Oxhumana nabo abathembekile okungenani abangu-2 nomkhawulo ≥ 2
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Faka umushwana wokungena ukuze ubethelwe. Khumbula - ukululama ngaphandle kwakho akunakwenzeka.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Faka umushwana wokungena owusebenzisile ngenkathi udala isipele.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Susa ukwenza isipele kokhiye? Lesi senzo asinakuhlehliswa.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Hoxisa konke ukwabelana ngokhiye? Ukubuyisela ngoxhumana nabo abathembekile ngeke kwenzeke.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Ukhiye wakho oyinhloko uzohlukaniswa abe amasheya angu-N kusetshenziswa i-Shamir scheme. Noma yikuphi ukwabelana kwe-M kuzovumela ukutholwa kokhiye. Isabelo ngasinye sibethelwe koxhumana naye othile othembekile.
keyBackup.thresholdRange: Umkhawulo kufanele usuke ku-2 ukuya ku-{max}
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Okungenani ontanga abasebenzayo abangu-2 abanokubethela kuyadingeka
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Susa ikhophi yasenqolobaneni ehlanganisiwe? Amashadi kontanga azohlala, kodwa imethadatha izolahleka.

location.macStep1: 1. i-macOS: Okuthandwayo Kwesistimu → Ubumfihlo → Amasevisi Endawo → vumela isiphequluli
location.macStep2: 2. Isiphequluli: chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela
location.otherBrowserHint: Chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela, bese ulayisha kabusha ikhasi

ssl.skippedHttp: ⚡ I-SSL yeqiwe. I-Node izosebenza ngaphezu kwe-HTTP.

upload.chunkFailed: I-Chunk {chunk} ihlulekile ngemva kokuzama kabusha okungu-{retries}
upload.csrfNotFound: Ithokheni ye-CSRF ayitholakali — sicela uqale kabusha ikhasi.

pageBuilder.dropHint: Hudula amafayela lapha noma chofoza ukuze ukhethe

botConstructor.title: I-Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Yakha i-bot yakho ngokubukeka - ayikho ikhodi edingekayo
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Umlayezo wokwamukela uma umsebenzisi eqala i-bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Siyakwamukela! Ngiyibhot yakho. Sebenzisa /siza ukubona imiyalo.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Iphendula lapho umsebenzisi ethumela umyalo othile (isb. /help, /start). Ungangeza izinyathelo zengxoxo ukuze udale izingxoxo ezinezinyathelo eziningi.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Iphendula lapho umlayezo womsebenzisi ufana nephethini. Isebenzisa i-regex - isb. "sawubona|hi" ifanelana namagama womabili. Akuzwakali.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Umlayezo wokuqala abasebenzisi abawubonayo lapho beqala i-bot nge/start. Yonke i-bot kufanele ibe neyodwa.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Ithumela umlayezo ngokuzenzakalelayo kushejuli. Kulungele izikhumbuzi zansuku zonke, izinhlabamkhosi zamasonto onke, noma izimemezelo zezikhathi ezithile.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Ihlanganisa i-bot logic. Hlola okokufaka okuhlukile noma komsebenzisi bese uphendula ngendlela ehlukile ngokusekelwe kumphumela.
botConstructor.docsRandom: I-Bot ikhetha impendulo eyodwa ngokungahleliwe ohlwini. Ilungele amahlaya, amathiphu, ukubingelela, noma izimpendulo ezihlukahlukene.
botConstructor.docsApi: Yenza isicelo se-HTTP ku-API yangaphandle futhi isebenzisa impendulo kumlayezo we-bot. Sebenzisa okuthi {data.field} ukuze ubhekise izinkambu zokuphendula.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Ithumela isaziso kumphathi wegumbi uma icushwa. Iwusizo ngezexwayiso, izaziso zabasebenzisi abasha, noma ukulinganisela.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Engeza izinyathelo ku-Command block ukuze udale izingxoxo ezisebenzisanayo. Isinyathelo ngasinye sibuza umbuzo, silinda impendulo yomsebenzisi, bese siyilondoloza kokuhlukile. Sebenzisa okuhlukile empendulweni yokugcina ethi {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Sebenzisa abakaki abagoqekile {variable} kumbhalo wokuphendula ukuze ufake amanani aguqukayo. Izimo eziguquguqukayo ziyaqhubeka kuyo yonke imilayezo.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Okuguquguqukayo okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kuyatholakala kuyo yonke impendulo:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Qala ngebhulokhi Yokwamukela — yinto yokuqala abasebenzisi abayibonayo
botConstructor.docsTip2: Engeza umyalo /help obala yonke imiyalo etholakalayo
botConstructor.docsTip3: Sebenzisa izinyathelo zengxoxo zokubhalisa, izinhlolovo, noma ukuqoqwa kwedatha
botConstructor.docsTip4: Hlanganisa amabhlogo weSimo ngokuguquguqukayo ukuze uthole i-smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Hlola i-bot yakho ngokukhuluma nayo ekamelweni ngemva kokuyiphakela

gravitixDocs.title: I-Gravitix Language Reference
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Ulimi lokubhala olusebenza kahle lokwakha ama-bots. 96 izici. I-rust backend.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: I-Gravitix iwulimi oluqondene nesizinda esithile (i-DSL) eklanywe kusukela phansi ukuze ibhale ama-Vortex bots. Lapho ezinye izilimi zidinga amalabhulali, ama-callbacks, ne-boilerplate, i-Gravitix ikunikeza izibambi zomcimbi ezisezingeni lokuqala, ukugeleza kwengxoxo, nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi — konke ku-syntax ehlanzekile, efundekayo egqugquzelwe yi-Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Iyafundeka — ikhodi ifundeka njengenhloso, hhayi umshini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — amaphutha ezinhlobo ezimile ngaphambi kwesikhathi sokusebenza
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive — ukugeleza, onogada, nokumataniswa kwephethini kwakhelwe ngaphakathi
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal — awekho amakilasi, awekho amafa, awekho izinhlaka okumele zifundwe
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: I-Gravitix eyanoma ubani ofuna ukwakha i-Vortex bot ngokushesha - kungakhathaliseki ukuthi awukaze ubhale ikhodi ngaphambili, noma ungunjiniyela ongumakadebona okhathele i-Python boilerplate. Lesi sithenjwa sifundisa i-Gravitix kusuka ezimisweni zokuqala: asikho isipiliyoni sangaphambili esidingekayo.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Isigaba ngasinye sakhela kwezidlule. Uma umusha ekwenzeni izinhlelo, funda ukusuka phezulu kuye phansi. Uma usulwazi olunye ulimi, sebenzisa ithebula lokuqukethwe ukuze ugxumele kulokho okuthakaselayo.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Indlela eshesha kakhulu ukusuka ku-zero ukuya ku-bot esebenzayo.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on/start {... } — ichaza isibambi esisebenza lapho umsebenzisi ethumela /qalisa. khipha "..." - ithumela umlayezo emuva kumsebenzisi. {ctx.first_name} — ihumusha igama lokuqala lomsebenzisi kuyunithi yezinhlamvu.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Ku-Gravitix IDE, chofoza inkinobho ethi Qalisa kubha ephezulu. Faka i-Vortex Bot Token yakho uma utshelwa. I-bot iqala ngokushesha - asikho isinyathelo sokwakha esidingekayo.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Lonke uhlelo lwe-Gravitix lwakhiwe kusuka kumabhulokhi wokwakha amathathu ayisisekelo: izibambi, izitatimende ezikhiphayo, nokunengqondo.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Lonke inani ku-Gravitix linohlobo. Isistimu yohlobo imile: izinhlobo ziyahlolwa ngesikhathi sokuhlanganiswa, ngaphambi kokuthi i-bot yakho iqalise.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Ama-opharetha ahlanganisa amanani ukuze akhiqize amanani amasha.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Izintambo ku-Gravitix ziwumbhalo obhalwe ngekhodi we-UTF-8. Basekela ukuhumusha okucebile kanye nohlu lwemisebenzi eyakhelwe ngaphakathi.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Iphethini-fanisa inani ngokumelene namaphethini amaningi. Kucabange njengesitatimende esinamandla sokushintsha.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Imisebenzi ingamabhulokhi ekhodi asebenziseka kabusha. Zikusiza ukuthi ugweme ukuphindaphinda futhi zenze ikhodi iqondeke kalula.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Izibambi ziyinhliziyo ye-Gravitix bot. Isibambi ngasinye silalela uhlobo oluthile lomcimbi futhi siqalisa lapho lowo mcimbi wenzeka.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Onogada bakuvumela ukuthi wengeze umbandela kusibambi. Isibambi sisebenza kuphela uma unogada ehlola ukuthi kuyiqiniso.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Into ye-ctx itholakala ngokuzenzakalelayo ngaphakathi kwaso sonke isibambi. Iqukethe ulwazi mayelana nomlayezo wamanje kanye nomsebenzisi owuthumele.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: I-State ivumela i-bot yakho ikhumbule izinto phakathi kwemilayezo. Ngaphandle kwesimo, yonke imilayezo izimele futhi i-bot ayinayo inkumbulo.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Ukugeleza kukuvumela ukuthi ubhale izingxoxo ezinezinyathelo eziningi ngendlela ewumugqa, efundekayo. Ukugeleza kungama isikhashana futhi kulinde umlayezo olandelayo womsebenzisi.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Qalisa ikhodi ngokuzenzakalelayo kushejuli — ayikho imisebenzi ye-cron, azikho izinsiza zangaphandle ezidingekayo.
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: I-opharetha yepayipi |> idlulisa inani njenge-agumenti yokuqala kumsebenzi olandelayo. Yenza imisebenzi ye-chaining ifundeke, ukusuka kwesobunxele kuye kwesokudla.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: I-Gravitix ihlinzeka ngokuphathwa kwephutha elihlelekile nge-try / catch / ekugcineni ivimba.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Izakhiwo zikuvumela ukuthi uqoqe idatha ehlobene ngaphansi kohlobo oluqanjwe igama. I-Enums ichaza isethi evaliwe yokuhluka.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: I-Gravitix ithumela umtapo wolwazi wezibalo onemisebenzi engu-~180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: I-Gravitix inohlobo lwendabuko oluyinkimbinkimbi - ipheya ye-64-bit entantayo emele izingxenye zangempela nezicatshangelwayo.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: I-Gravitix ihlanganisa i-calculus yezinombolo: okuphuma kokunye nezihlanganisi ezibalwe emisebenzini engafanele.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: I-algebra yomugqa yizibalo zamavekhtha kanye nomatikuletsheni.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Ithiyori yezinombolo icwaninga izici zama-integers. Isisekelo se-cryptography yesimanje.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Izibalo zinikeza amathuluzi okuchaza, ukuhlaziya, kanye nokwenza iziphetho ngedatha.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Imisebenzi ekhethekile iyizixazululo zezibalo ezibalulekile ezihlukanisayo.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Uguquko lweFourier lubolisa isignali kumafrikhwensi akhona.
gravitixDocs.bp3: Sebenzisa onogada esikhundleni se-if-chain ukuze uthole izimvume
gravitixDocs.bp5: Sebenzisa ukubuyisela kusenesikhathi ukuze unciphise ukuzalela
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Indlela engcono kakhulu yokufunda iGravitix ukwakha. Qala nge-echo bot elula, bese wengeza isimo, bese wengeza ukugeleza. Umqondo ngamunye omusha owufundayo uvula amathuba engeziwe.
